rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARTYNENKO FAMILY 1991 TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petitioner Zoya Soane'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Admissions;
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, August 7, 2008. Petitioner Zoya Soane's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories and requests for admissions and attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to serve further verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Respondent is also ordered to contact counsel for petitioner to schedule the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $727.50 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EDITH RITA FARRELL REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Demurrer And Motion To Strike; Verified Demurrer Of Donald Farrell To Verified Petition Of Lois Farrell;
rulings.Rulings: Tentative ruling: Demurrer - overruled - 10 days to Answer; Motion to Strike: Denied; Request for Judicial Notice: Granted.
